title: Checkbook Diplomacy - Sarah Paine
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Sarah Paine on checkbook diplomacy, examining how nations use financial leverage as a diplomatic tool. The episode explores strategies and implications of monetary influence in international relations.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Sarah Paine about checkbook diplomacy, the use of financial incentives as a tool in foreign policy. The conversation examines how money shapes international relations and diplomatic negotiations. The episode situates financial leverage within the broader practice of statecraft.
